title: index
text:
This is the home page of a minimal Quarto website.
Use the navigation bar to visit the About page or download the PDF report.





trigger wf
site 004
wf cp -ar to copy site-libs
ls output: chk libs.
with new wf, rsync in image installed: no, –no-delete unknown
t4, test on m12, wks.
t5: site_libs was in ignore. rm.
t6

title: About
text:
About
This page is part of the same website.
It shows that you can have multiple HTML pages and still offer a separate PDF report.

echo: false, readlines
cell-output cell-output-stdout


[1] "System prompt: You are a member of the german parliament. You will be provided a plenary protocol text. Please summarize the text for presentation to your local community. Output summary in german language. Constraints: No preamble, output summary as plaintext with no extra formatting, limit summary to 20% of input text."
[2] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  
[3] "Plenary protocol text: _bttx_"

System prompt: You are a member of the german parliament. You will be provided a plenary protocol text. Please summarize the text for presentation to your local community. Output summary in german language. Constraints: No preamble, output summary as plaintext with no extra formatting, limit summary to 20% of input text.
Plenary protocol text: bttx

div
txt <- readLines("gemini-prompt.txt")
cat(sprintf('<div class="cell-output cell-output-stdout">
<pre><code>%s</code></pre>
</div>',txt))

System prompt: You are a member of the german parliament. You will be provided a plenary protocol text. Please summarize the text for presentation to your local community. Output summary in german language. Constraints: No preamble, output summary as plaintext with no extra formatting, limit summary to 20% of input text.





Plenary protocol text: _bttx_

System prompt: You are a member of the german parliament. You will be provided a plenary protocol text. Please summarize the text for presentation to your local community.
